questions.q: Which of the following is a major advantage of the Indian Railways?
Describe the importance of telecommunications in the development of India.
questions.answer: Telecommunications plays a vital role in the development of India as it facilitates the exchange of information and ideas between different regions, fosters economic growth, and enhances the overall quality of life.

questions.q: Explain the role of the Indian space programme in the development of the country. (15 marks)
questions.answer: The Indian space programme has played a significant role in the development of the country. It has contributed to the growth of the economy, improved communication, and enhanced national security. Additionally, it has facilitated the creation of new technologies and the development of new industries.

questions.q: The _______ is the backbone of India's transportation network.
True or False: The Indian government has invested heavily in the development of the country's road network.
Describe the significance of the Inland Water Transport system in India. (5 marks)
questions.answer: The Inland Water Transport system is an important mode of transportation in India, particularly in the eastern and northeastern regions. It provides a cost-effective and environmentally friendly means of transporting goods and people.

questions.q: What is the main advantage of using the air transport system in India?
questions.answer: The main advantage of using the air transport system in India is its speed and efficiency, which enables the rapid transportation of people and goods over long distances.

questions.q: Explain the role of the postal department in the development of India's communication system.
questions.answer: The postal department plays a vital role in the development of India's communication system by providing a reliable and efficient means of sending and receiving mail and parcels.

questions.q: What is the significance of the development of the telecommunications industry in India?
questions.answer: The development of the telecommunications industry in India has led to significant improvements in the country's communication infrastructure, enabling faster and more efficient exchange of information.

questions.q: Describe the importance of the Indian space programme in the country's economic development. (10 marks)
questions.answer: The Indian space programme has played a significant role in the country's economic development. It has contributed to the growth of the economy, improved communication, and enhanced national security.
